input.content:
name: Test Results Aggregator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * *'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURES_DIR: fixtures

jobs:
  aggregate:
    name: Aggregate test results
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Aggregate fixtures and write summary
        run: |
          bun run src/aggregator.ts \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run1.xml" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run2.json" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run3.xml" \
            > aggregate-output.md || true
          echo "---BEGIN SUMMARY---"
          cat aggregate-output.md
          echo "---END SUMMARY---"

      - name: Assert expected aggregates
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -e
          grep -q "| Total | 15 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Passed | 10 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Failed | 2 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Skipped | 3 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "auth.login_failure" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "api.get_users" aggregate-output.md
          echo "All assertions passed"

on:

permissions:

env:
  FIXTURES_DIR: fixtures

jobs:
  aggregate:
    name: Aggregate test results
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Aggregate fixtures and write summary
        run: |
          bun run src/aggregator.ts \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run1.xml" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run2.json" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run3.xml" \
            > aggregate-output.md || true
          echo "---BEGIN SUMMARY---"
          cat aggregate-output.md
          echo "---END SUMMARY---"

      - name: Assert expected aggregates
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -e
          grep -q "| Total | 15 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Passed | 10 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Failed | 2 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Skipped | 3 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "auth.login_failure" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "api.get_users" aggregate-output.md
          echo "All assertions passed"

content.content: The file /home/passp/repos/compare-agent-scripting-by-language/workspaces/2026-04-17_004319/15-test-results-aggregator/typescript-bun-opus47-1m-medium/.github/workflows/test-results-aggregator.yml has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.oldString:
- name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test
tool_use_result.newString:
- name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test tests/
tool_use_result.originalFile:
name: Test Results Aggregator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * *'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURES_DIR: fixtures

jobs:
  aggregate:
    name: Aggregate test results
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: bun test

      - name: Aggregate fixtures and write summary
        run: |
          bun run src/aggregator.ts \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run1.xml" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run2.json" \
            "$FIXTURES_DIR/run3.xml" \
            > aggregate-output.md || true
          echo "---BEGIN SUMMARY---"
          cat aggregate-output.md
          echo "---END SUMMARY---"

      - name: Assert expected aggregates
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -e
          grep -q "| Total | 15 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Passed | 10 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Failed | 2 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "| Skipped | 3 |" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "auth.login_failure" aggregate-output.md
          grep -q "api.get_users" aggregate-output.md
          echo "All assertions passed"

lines: - name: Aggregate fixtures and write summary

content.text:
Complete. 18/18 tests pass via `bun test`.

- **src/aggregator.ts** — JUnit XML + JSON parsers, totals, flaky detection, markdown rendering, CLI
- **tests/aggregator.test.ts** — 14 unit tests (TDD red→green)
- **fixtures/run{1,2,3}.{xml,json}** — 3 simulated matrix runs exposing 2 flaky tests
- **.github/workflows/test-results-aggregator.yml** — checkout → setup-bun → unit tests → aggregate → grep assertions; passes actionlint
- **harness/e2e.test.ts** — 2 act `push` cases (`default-flaky`, `all-green`) in temp git repos, asserting exact values and "Job succeeded"
- **act-result.txt** — 15KB, 2 case banners, 2 "Job succeeded"

result:
Complete. 18/18 tests pass via `bun test`.

- **src/aggregator.ts** — JUnit XML + JSON parsers, totals, flaky detection, markdown rendering, CLI
- **tests/aggregator.test.ts** — 14 unit tests (TDD red→green)
- **fixtures/run{1,2,3}.{xml,json}** — 3 simulated matrix runs exposing 2 flaky tests
- **.github/workflows/test-results-aggregator.yml** — checkout → setup-bun → unit tests → aggregate → grep assertions; passes actionlint
- **harness/e2e.test.ts** — 2 act `push` cases (`default-flaky`, `all-green`) in temp git repos, asserting exact values and "Job succeeded"
- **act-result.txt** — 15KB, 2 case banners, 2 "Job succeeded"
